subcodes.first_line: O thou my fellow countryman! Although ‘Abdu’l-Baha was born in Tihran and for successive years wandered homeless in Iraq
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هموطن عبدالبهاء هر چند مولد در طهران و سنین متوالیات آواره عراق و مدتی
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @unity; oneness of humanity
